image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Science has a clearer story about p hacking than social media does.
Context visual: P hacking is manipulating data to achieve statistically significant results.
Escalation visual: Researchers might change data points or test conditions to find that magical p-value.
Evidence visual: Studies suggest that nearly 30% of research may have p hacking.
Payoff visual: This compromises trust in science. Accurate reporting matters.
Cta visual: Stay informed. Follow for more insights on science.
